_comment: GitHub Copilot CLI native hooks (schema v1: requires top-level 'version' + 'hooks' object; entries use 'bash'/'type', NOT 'command'/'args'). Bridges every event to the unified hook system via copilot-bridge.sh. cwd defaults to '.', which is the coding repo root when copilot is launched here, so the relative bridge path resolves and the script self-locates CODING_REPO from its own path. Do NOT use $CODING_REPO in 'cwd' — Copilot does not expand env vars there and a literal path yields 'spawn bash ENOENT' under fail-closed preToolUse, bricking the CLI.
